parameters.query: =INSERT INTO daily_metrics (fecha, spend, impressions, reach, clicks, ctr, cpc, sesiones, cta_clicks, modal_opens, form_submits, leads, aprobados, no_aprobados, cpl, cpl_aprobado, bounce_rate, dispositivo_top, tasa_conversion_landing, tasa_modal_lead, tasa_cta_modal) VALUES ('{{ $json.fecha }}', {{ $json.spend }}, {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.clicks }}, {{ $json.ctr }}, {{ $json.cpc }}, {{ $json.sesiones }}, {{ $json.cta_clicks }}, {{ $json.modal_opens }}, {{ $json.form_submits }}, {{ $json.leads }}, {{ $json.aprobados }}, {{ $json.no_aprobados }}, {{ $json.cpl }}, {{ $json.cpl_aprobado }}, {{ $json.bounce_rate }}, '{{ $json.dispositivo_top }}', {{ $json.tasa_conversion_landing }}, {{ $json.tasa_modal_lead }}, {{ $json.tasa_cta_modal }}) ON CONFLICT (fecha) DO UPDATE SET spend=EXCLUDED.spend, impressions=EXCLUDED.impressions, reach=EXCLUDED.reach, clicks=EXCLUDED.clicks, ctr=EXCLUDED.ctr, cpc=EXCLUDED.cpc, sesiones=EXCLUDED.sesiones, cta_clicks=EXCLUDED.cta_clicks, modal_opens=EXCLUDED.modal_opens, form_submits=EXCLUDED.form_submits, leads=EXCLUDED.leads, aprobados=EXCLUDED.aprobados, no_aprobados=EXCLUDED.no_aprobados, cpl=EXCLUDED.cpl, cpl_aprobado=EXCLUDED.cpl_aprobado, bounce_rate=EXCLUDED.bounce_rate, dispositivo_top=EXCLUDED.dispositivo_top, tasa_conversion_landing=EXCLUDED.tasa_conversion_landing, tasa_modal_lead=EXCLUDED.tasa_modal_lead, tasa_cta_modal=EXCLUDED.tasa_cta_modal;

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $('Consolidate Data').first().json; const fecha = d.fecha; const statusColor = d.leads > 0 ? '#27ae60' : '#e74c3c'; const statusText = d.leads > 0 ? 'LEADS GENERADOS' : 'SIN LEADS'; const html = `

Reporte Diario - Landing Proper

${fecha}

${statusText}

Meta Ads

InversionS/${d.spend.toFixed(2)}
Impresiones${d.impressions.toLocaleString()}
Alcance${d.reach.toLocaleString()}
Clicks${d.clicks.toLocaleString()}
CTR${d.ctr}%
CPCS/${d.cpc.toFixed(2)}

Landing Page (GA4)

Sesiones${d.sesiones}
Clicks en CTA${d.cta_clicks}
Aperturas de Modal${d.modal_opens}
Formularios Enviados${d.form_submits}
Bounce Rate${d.bounce_rate}%

Leads (Bitrix)

Total Leads${d.leads}
Aprobados${d.aprobados}
No Aprobados${d.no_aprobados}

KPIs

Costo por Lead (CPL)S/${d.cpl.toFixed(2)}
CPL AprobadoS/${d.cpl_aprobado.toFixed(2)}
Tasa Conversion Landing${d.tasa_conversion_landing}%
Tasa Modal → Lead${d.tasa_modal_lead}%
Tasa CTA → Modal${d.tasa_cta_modal}%

Reporte generado automaticamente | Landing Meta Proper

landing-meta.proper.com.pe

`; return [{ json: { ...d, emailHtml: html } }];

parameters.subject: =Reporte Diario Proper Landing - {{ $json.fecha }} | {{ $json.leads }} leads | S/{{ $json.spend.toFixed(2) }} invertido

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO daily_metrics (fecha, spend, impressions, reach, clicks, ctr, cpc, sesiones, cta_clicks, modal_opens, form_submits, leads, aprobados, no_aprobados, cpl, cpl_aprobado, bounce_rate, dispositivo_top, tasa_conversion_landing, tasa_modal_lead, tasa_cta_modal) VALUES ('{{ $json.fecha }}', {{ $json.spend }}, {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.clicks }}, {{ $json.ctr }}, {{ $json.cpc }}, {{ $json.sesiones }}, {{ $json.cta_clicks }}, {{ $json.modal_opens }}, {{ $json.form_submits }}, {{ $json.leads }}, {{ $json.aprobados }}, {{ $json.no_aprobados }}, {{ $json.cpl }}, {{ $json.cpl_aprobado }}, {{ $json.bounce_rate }}, '{{ $json.dispositivo_top }}', {{ $json.tasa_conversion_landing }}, {{ $json.tasa_modal_lead }}, {{ $json.tasa_cta_modal }}) ON CONFLICT (fecha) DO UPDATE SET spend=EXCLUDED.spend, impressions=EXCLUDED.impressions, reach=EXCLUDED.reach, clicks=EXCLUDED.clicks, ctr=EXCLUDED.ctr, cpc=EXCLUDED.cpc, sesiones=EXCLUDED.sesiones, cta_clicks=EXCLUDED.cta_clicks, modal_opens=EXCLUDED.modal_opens, form_submits=EXCLUDED.form_submits, leads=EXCLUDED.leads, aprobados=EXCLUDED.aprobados, no_aprobados=EXCLUDED.no_aprobados, cpl=EXCLUDED.cpl, cpl_aprobado=EXCLUDED.cpl_aprobado, bounce_rate=EXCLUDED.bounce_rate, dispositivo_top=EXCLUDED.dispositivo_top, tasa_conversion_landing=EXCLUDED.tasa_conversion_landing, tasa_modal_lead=EXCLUDED.tasa_modal_lead, tasa_cta_modal=EXCLUDED.tasa_cta_modal;

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(spend),0) as total_spend, COALESCE(SUM(impressions),0) as total_impressions, COALESCE(SUM(reach),0) as total_reach, COALESCE(SUM(clicks),0) as total_clicks, COALESCE(SUM(leads),0) as total_leads, COALESCE(SUM(aprobados),0) as total_aprobados, COALESCE(SUM(no_aprobados),0) as total_no_aprobados, COALESCE(SUM(sesiones),0) as total_sesiones, COALESCE(SUM(form_submits),0) as total_form_submits, COUNT(*) as dias_activos FROM daily_metrics;
